Tom (shakespearean): u art be unvaling, I mine with chldy Riegrser: and thou Dafight long; So, he think than benglem's hop foour Right sonit, W

Tom (shakespearean): wark their gravan. Soy: QUEN ELIZABETHAMhy, I, comes? VOMNIRILIA: Whoave thy forminess apitity, nd masts, Yeing such
